Name: Staff Phishing Awareness Training
Name_ZH: 员工钓鱼攻击安全意识培训
Description: Quarterly training on recognising phishing emails and reporting suspicious messages.
Description_ZH: 每季度开展识别钓鱼邮件与上报可疑信息的安全意识培训。

Name: Security Induction for New Starters
Name_ZH: 新员工网络安全入职培训
Description: Basic cyber hygiene training for all new staff members.
Description_ZH: 面向全体新员工的基础网络安全卫生培训。

Name: Targeted Awareness for High-Risk Roles
Name_ZH: 高风险岗位定向安全培训
Description: Additional security guidance for finance, HR and system administrators.
Description_ZH: 针对财务、人力资源和系统管理员等高风险岗位的专项安全指导。

Name: Documented Security Policies
Name_ZH: 网络安全管理制度建设
Description: Maintain clear written security policies covering accounts, data and acceptable use.
Description_ZH: 建立并维护涵盖账号管理、数据使用和可接受行为的书面安全制度。

Name: Joiners-Movers-Leavers Process
Description: Formal process to create, change and remove user accounts when staff join, move or leave.
Description_ZH: 建立正式流程，在员工入职、转岗或离职时及时创建、变更或注销账号。

Name: Incident Reporting & Escalation Procedure
Name_ZH: 安全事件报告与处置规程
Description: Clear steps for staff to report suspected incidents and for IT to triage them.
Description_ZH: 为员工提供明确的安全事件上报步骤，并规范IT部门的分级响应流程。

Name: Password Complexity Policy
Description: Enforce minimum password length and complexity for all accounts.
Description_ZH: 对所有账号强制执行最低口令长度与复杂度要求。

Name: Account Lockout Policy
Name_ZH: 账号登录失败锁定策略
Description: Lock accounts after several failed login attempts to reduce brute force attacks.
Description_ZH: 账号多次登录失败后自动锁定，防范暴力破解攻击。

Name: Multi-Factor Authentication for Remote Access
Description: Require MFA for all VPN and remote access connections.
Description_ZH: 对所有VPN及远程访问连接强制启用多因素认证。

Name: MFA for Admin and High-Privilege Accounts
Description: Apply MFA to all administrator and privileged accounts.
Description_ZH: 对所有管理员及特权账号启用多因素身份鉴别。

Name: Regular Access Rights Review
Description: Review user and admin access rights at least quarterly.
Description_ZH: 至少每季度对用户及管理员的访问权限进行一次审查。

Name: Individual Named Accounts Only
Name_ZH: 禁止共享账号实名制管理
Description: Eliminate shared accounts in favour of uniquely assigned user IDs.
Description_ZH: 废除共享账号，为每位用户分配唯一标识账号。

Name: Privileged Access Workstations
Description: Use separate hardened devices for admin tasks.
Description_ZH: 使用独立加固终端执行管理员操作任务。

Name: Strong Identity Verification for New Accounts
Description: Verify staff identity before issuing accounts with access to critical systems.
Description_ZH: 在向员工签发可访问关键系统的账号前进行严格身份核验。

Name: Data Classification Scheme
Description: Label data as Public, Internal, Confidential or Highly Confidential.
Description_ZH: 按公开、内部、机密、高度机密对数据进行分类标记。

Name: Centralised File Storage
Description: Store important data on managed central file services instead of local devices.
Description_ZH: 将重要数据存储于受管理的集中文件服务中，避免存放在本地设备。

Name: Full Disk Encryption on Laptops
Description: Encrypt all managed laptops using full-disk encryption.
Description_ZH: 对所有受管笔记本电脑启用全盘加密。

Name: Encrypted Removable Media Only
Name_ZH: 移动存储介质加密管控
Description: Allow only approved encrypted USB drives on endpoints.
Description_ZH: 终端仅允许使用经审批的加密U盘。

Name: Secure Backup with Offline Copies
Name_ZH: 数据备份与离线副本保护
Description: Maintain regular backups with at least one offline or immutable copy.
Description_ZH: 定期备份数据并至少保留一份离线或不可篡改的副本。

Name: Access Control on Shared Folders
Name_ZH: 共享目录最小权限访问控制
Description: Apply least-privilege access permissions on network shares.
Description_ZH: 对网络共享目录实施最小权限访问控制策略。

Name: Secure Disposal of Media
Description: Sanitise or destroy storage devices before disposal.
Description_ZH: 在废弃存储设备前进行安全清除或物理销毁。

Name: Cloud Storage Configuration Review
Name_ZH: 云存储访问配置定期审查
Description: Regularly review access and sharing settings for cloud storage services.
Description_ZH: 定期审查云存储服务的访问权限与共享配置。

Name: Baseline Secure Configuration
Description: Apply a hardened baseline configuration to servers and endpoints.
Description_ZH: 对服务器和终端实施加固的安全基线配置。

Name: Patch Management Process
Description: Apply security patches on a regular schedule, prioritising critical updates.
Description_ZH: 按计划定期应用安全补丁，优先修复高危漏洞。

Name: Antivirus / Endpoint Protection
Description: Run centrally managed anti-malware on endpoints and servers.
Description_ZH: 在终端和服务器上部署集中管理的防恶意代码软件。

Name: Application Allowlisting for Critical Systems
Name_ZH: 关键系统应用程序白名单
Description: Restrict critical servers to run only approved applications.
Description_ZH: 限制关键服务器仅运行经审批的应用程序。

Name: Remove Default and Shared System Accounts
Name_ZH: 默认账号与共享账号清理
Description: Disable or change default accounts and remove shared admin accounts.
Description_ZH: 禁用或修改默认账号，清除共享管理员账号。

Name: Secure Remote Administration
Description: Use secure protocols and jump hosts for remote admin access.
Description_ZH: 使用安全协议和跳板机进行远程管理员访问。

Name: Configuration Change Control
Description: Formal approval and logging for security-relevant configuration changes.
Description_ZH: 对安全相关的配置变更实施正式审批并留存记录。

Name: Perimeter Firewall Ruleset
Name_ZH: 网络边界访问控制策略
Description: Block unnecessary inbound and outbound traffic at the network perimeter.
Description_ZH: 在网络边界封堵不必要的入站和出站流量。

Name: Internal Network Segmentation
Description: Separate user networks from server and management networks.
Description_ZH: 将用户网络与服务器及管理网络进行隔离分区。

Name: Secure Wi-Fi Configuration
Description: Use strong encryption and separate guest Wi-Fi from internal networks.
Description_ZH: 使用强加密协议，并将访客Wi-Fi与内部网络隔离。

Name: VPN for Remote Access
Description: Require secure VPN for staff connecting from the internet.
Description_ZH: 要求员工通过安全VPN进行互联网远程接入。

Name: Network Device Hardening
Description: Harden routers and switches, disabling unused services and ports.
Description_ZH: 对路由器和交换机进行安全加固，关闭未使用的服务和端口。

Name: Central Log Collection
Description: Forward security logs from key systems to a central log server.
Description_ZH: 将关键系统的安全日志汇聚至集中日志服务器。

Name: Basic Alerting on Suspicious Events
Description: Generate alerts for repeated failed logins and unusual admin activity.
Description_ZH: 对重复登录失败和异常管理员操作生成告警。

Name: Regular Log Review
Description: Review key security logs on at least a weekly basis.
Description_ZH: 至少每周对关键安全日志进行一次人工审查。

Name: Approved Supplier List
Description: Use an approved list of IT suppliers with basic security checks.
Description_ZH: 建立经过基础安全审查的IT供应商准入名单。

Name: Software from Trusted Sources Only
Description: Install software only from trusted repositories or vendors.
Description_ZH: 仅允许从可信仓库或供应商安装软件。

Name: Basic Incident Response Plan
Name_ZH: 网络安全事件应急预案
Description: Documented steps to contain and recover from common cyber incidents.
Description_ZH: 制定并记录应对常见网络安全事件的处置与恢复步骤。

Name: Backup Restore Testing
Description: Regularly test restoration of backups for critical systems.
Description_ZH: 定期对关键系统的数据备份进行恢复测试演练。
